one_time_description: Comprehensive Settlement Agreement with Canada and Manitoba related to flooding on the First Nation; legal fees of $4,047,864 owing but not yet recorded pending finalization expected in 2024-25
economic_notes: Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding under Treaty with Government of Canada. Flooding settlement agreement with Canada and Manitoba agreed to in principle, expected finalized in 2024-25 fiscal year.
notes: Province is Manitoba (not AB). One consolidated subsidiary: CMHC Housing Authority. Construction in progress of $3,621,091 is included in non-financial assets but shown separately from TCA on balance sheet. Flooding CSA with Canada and Manitoba agreed to in principle; $4,047,864 in legal fees not yet recorded pending finalization. Prior year audited by a different firm. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only ($105,563); new proceeds of $184,900 drawn in year. Net debt position of $1,794,738.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (77.3%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
